# ComfortERP

All-in-one ERP solution for WordPress

## Site Purpose

site-purpose: This website is the official platform for ComfortERP, an all-in-one ERP solution for WordPress. It provides tools for businesses to manage and grow, covering accounting, inventory, and invoicing, with an emphasis on its free, open-source core plugins and integrated HRM modules.. Most important wordpress plugin products are Comfort Accounting, Comfort Inventory and Invoice.
